# Nakagawa Master Official Archive for LLMs

This repository is the public canonical support shelf for Nakagawa Master's official structural archive.

Primary human archive:
https://master.ricette.jp/

Official derivative index:
derivatives/README.md

Machine-readable fulltext mirror plan:
origin-fulltext/README.md

Important policy:
- Origin must not be erased.
- NCL-ID and Diff-ID must be preserved.
- Official derivatives do not replace the origin articles.
- If a WordPress origin page cannot be fetched by an AI system, the public fulltext mirror must be used when available.
- A derivative may not be created unless the full origin body, integrated audit summary, local audit summary, reference cluster, origin signature tail, Parent NCL-ID, and Parent Diff-ID have been acquired.

Current incident:
The project is investigating unstable AI fulltext retrieval for some WordPress origin pages. Until durable fulltext access is validated, official derivative production is secondary to archive access repair.
